sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Added a new toggle 'Show artist'.
Tablet mode buttons with new positions.
Option to move the Media Source buttons to another placement.
Added a toggle to hide Auto (Smart Selection).
Parallelized lyric fetching requests.
Updated translations.
Added an option to pause text scrolling while playback is paused.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed the artist name being cropped in Panel Mode.
Fixed the artist name and song title not displaying correctly on startup.

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Added a 'Scroll Action' mode for fast-forward and rewind.
Added per-app volume control.
Restored the original GNOME accent color after the player closes.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed a crash in the Lyrics view.
Fixed a Telegram integration crash.

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Added up to two customizable control buttons to the pop-up (Volume, Seek, Audio Output, Sleep Timer, Playback Speed or Recently Played).
Added a first-time hint suggesting users explore additional settings.
Added a setting to scroll long text only while hovering over the pill.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed GNOME Shell freezes caused by unexpected metadata states.
Fixed History displaying incorrect album art for slow players and preventing duplicate entries.
Fixed Dash to Dock autohide breaking after locking and unlocking the screen.
Fixed duplicate pills occasionally appearing after unlock.
Fixed duplicate title and artist display.
Fixed the visualizer not updating correctly when switching between Pill and Pop-up modes.
Fixed the History scroll area becoming covered and unclickable.
Fixed the first-time hint buttons (Settings and Close) not responding.

subtitle: Real-Time Visualizer, App Mapping & Major Fixes

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Added a CAVA-powered real-time audio visualizer.
Added Accent Color Sync based on the current album artwork.
Added manual App ID mapping for unsupported players.
Introduced multi-language support.
Implemented a shared visualizer engine for better performance.
Added an internal cache system.

sections.title: 🎨 Customization & Enhancements
items: Added advanced visualizer customization (bars, width, height, margin and border radius).
Added adjustable fade animations for lyrics and scrolling text.
Added dedicated Tablet Mode controls and touchscreen improvements.
Added vinyl rotation speed and automatic pop-up hide options.
Added dynamic width with crossfade and an Outer Edge Margin setting.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed blurry album art and text inside the pop-up.
Fixed background colors not updating correctly from album artwork.
Fixed selecting a paused player hiding the pill and breaking the player selector.
Fixed Spotify window detection when closing.
Fixed the microphone activating while using the CAVA visualizer.
Fixed floating menu alignment with Dash to Dock.
Fixed Dash to Dock alignment when changing icon positions.
Fixed Strawberry album artwork not loading correctly.

sections.title: ✨ Improvements
items: Added Double Click mouse action.
Added Always ON mode.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed the seek bar becoming glitchy.
Fixed high CPU usage with Dash to Dock autohide mode.

sections.title: ✨ Improvements
items: Added dynamic contrast for album art, text and controls.
Player Selector now follows custom color settings.
Applied dynamic contrast to the Player Selector.
Improved DBus player detection for names and icons.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed pop-up resizing and jumping when Custom Width was enabled.

subtitle: Ubuntu Dock Support, UI Fixes & Stability

sections.title: ✨ Improvements
items: Added automatic vertical mode for side docks (Ubuntu Dock, etc.).
Improved seek bar synchronization.
Added a toggle to disable the Main Pill outline border.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed the pill disappearing when moving the dock.
Fixed the pill hitbox.

sections.title: ✨ Improvements
items: Added custom text and background colors.
Introduced the new Player Selector.
Added the Invert Scrolling option.
Added a new Hover mouse action.

sections.title: 🐛 General
items: Various bug fixes and performance improvements.
